appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais où Bloch se trompait... »; « Tout ce que Bloch put tirer de Norpois... »; « Norpois ne répondit pas »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator asserts Bloch’s error about Norpois and shows his failure to obtain substantive truth, framing him as naive and rhetorically ineffective.

status_effects.explanation: He loses ground in the exchange with Norpois, who deflects him; the narrator emphasizes Bloch’s mistaken assumptions and lack of leverage.
